revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Navbox suite]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Navbox_suite]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: // Edit via Wikiplus
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Navbox_suite]]
Adding [[Category:original pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Unsorted link categories]] to [[Category:bump 1-20]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Bump 1-20]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: attributing pages to myself

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] to [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: attributing page creation to myself as per first edit summary
Removing from [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: mass import of programmatically generated pages to give attribution and fill redlinks
Removing from [[Category:Pages needing attribution]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:Template" to "Category:"
Copying from [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Running a split because mass replace regex is the purpose of this category
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
removing the accumulated cruft that makes [[Special:ShortPages]] useless
Adding [[Category:11]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages to be written]]" to ""
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q5614660)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
